positive: A hyper-detailed, symmetrical mandala design featuring celestial elements interwoven with bioluminescent exotic flora. The composition must be centered and highly ornate, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Elements include crescent moons, stylized constellations, glowing jade leaves, and delicate cosmic dust trails forming complex radial symmetry. Use a palette of deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, vibrant turquoise, and metallic gold accents against a solid background. Clean silhouettes, linework should be crisp and graphic, emphasizing a deep, contrasting contrast. Zentangle and Art Nouveau influences, vector art aesthetic, ultra-detailed, high contrast, symmetrical radial pattern, clean background.
negative: blur, artifact, watermark, text, logo, trademark, signature, poorly drawn, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, messy lines, grainy, cartoon, photorealistic, depth of field, grayscale
